# Capabilities
Aspire.Hosting.Azure.Kubernetes/addAzureKubernetesEnvironment(name: string) -> Aspire.Hosting.Azure.Kubernetes/Aspire.Hosting.Azure.Kubernetes.AzureKubernetesEnvironmentResource
Aspire.Hosting.Azure.Kubernetes/addCertManager(name: string, chartVersion?: string) -> Aspire.Hosting.Kubernetes/Aspire.Hosting.Kubernetes.CertManagerResource
Aspire.Hosting.Azure.Kubernetes/addGateway(name: string) -> Aspire.Hosting.Kubernetes/Aspire.Hosting.Kubernetes.KubernetesGatewayResource
Aspire.Hosting.Azure.Kubernetes/addHelmChart(name: string, chartReference: string, chartVersion: string) -> Aspire.Hosting.Kubernetes/Aspire.Hosting.Kubernetes.KubernetesHelmChartResource
Aspire.Hosting.Azure.Kubernetes/addIngress(name: string) -> Aspire.Hosting.Kubernetes/Aspire.Hosting.Kubernetes.KubernetesIngressResource
Aspire.Hosting.Azure.Kubernetes/addLoadBalancer(name: string, subnet: Aspire.Hosting.Azure.Network/Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureSubnetResource) -> Aspire.Hosting.Azure.Kubernetes/Aspire.Hosting.Azure.Kubernetes.AzureKubernetesLoadBalancerResource
Aspire.Hosting.Azure.Kubernetes/addNodePool(name: string, vmSize?: string, minCount?: number, maxCount?: number) -> Aspire.Hosting.Azure.Kubernetes/Aspire.Hosting.Azure.Kubernetes.AksNodePoolResource
Aspire.Hosting.Azure.Kubernetes/withContainerRegistry(registry: Aspire.Hosting.Azure.ContainerRegistry/Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureContainerRegistryResource) -> Aspire.Hosting.Azure.Kubernetes/Aspire.Hosting.Azure.Kubernetes.AzureKubernetesEnvironmentResource
Aspire.Hosting.Azure.Kubernetes/withLoadBalancer(loadBalancer: Aspire.Hosting.Azure.Kubernetes/Aspire.Hosting.Azure.Kubernetes.AzureKubernetesLoadBalancerResource) -> Aspire.Hosting.Kubernetes/Aspire.Hosting.Kubernetes.KubernetesGatewayResource
Aspire.Hosting.Azure.Kubernetes/withLoadBalancerOnIngress(loadBalancer: Aspire.Hosting.Azure.Kubernetes/Aspire.Hosting.Azure.Kubernetes.AzureKubernetesLoadBalancerResource) -> Aspire.Hosting.Kubernetes/Aspire.Hosting.Kubernetes.KubernetesIngressResource
Aspire.Hosting.Azure.Kubernetes/withNodePoolSubnet(subnet: Aspire.Hosting.Azure.Network/Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureSubnetResource) -> Aspire.Hosting.Azure.Kubernetes/Aspire.Hosting.Azure.Kubernetes.AksNodePoolResource
Aspire.Hosting.Azure.Kubernetes/withSubnet(subnet: Aspire.Hosting.Azure.Network/Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureSubnetResource) -> Aspire.Hosting.Azure.Kubernetes/Aspire.Hosting.Azure.Kubernetes.AzureKubernetesEnvironmentResource
Aspire.Hosting.Azure.Kubernetes/withSystemNodePool(vmSize?: string, minCount?: number, maxCount?: number) -> Aspire.Hosting.Azure.Kubernetes/Aspire.Hosting.Azure.Kubernetes.AzureKubernetesEnvironmentResource
Aspire.Hosting.Azure.Kubernetes/withWorkloadIdentity(enabled?: boolean) -> Aspire.Hosting.Azure.Kubernetes/Aspire.Hosting.Azure.Kubernetes.AzureKubernetesEnvironmentResource
